name: Gallant Quartermaster
text: Interrupt: When this character is sacrificed – gain 2 fate.

name: Yasuki Hatsu
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you are less honorable than your opponent – search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for an attachment, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.

name: Daidoji Harrier
text: Reaction: After this character wins a [mil] conflict, your opponent chooses 2 cards in his or her hand – reveal those cards. You choose and discard one of them.

name: Hitsu-do Disciple
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict in which this character is participating, if you have played 3 or more cards during this conflict, choose another participating character – dishonor that character.

name: Togashi Ichi
text:
Disguised Monk.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, if 10 or more cards have been played during this conflict and if the attacked province is not a stronghold province – break that province.

name: Hero of Three Trees
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent, select one – either gain 1 honor, or the attacked province gets -1 strength until the end of the conflict (to a minimum of 0.)

name: Persuasive Counselor
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – each event you play during this conflict cannot have its effects canceled.

name: Student of Esoterica
text: You may spend fate from this character to pay for Spell cards.

name: Inferno Guard Invoker
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a participating character you control – honor that character. If a province is broken during this conflict, sacrifice this character at the end of the conflict.

name: Chrysanthemum Steward
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a card in your opponent's conflict discard pile – put that card on top of its owner's conflict deck.

name: Bayushi Shoju
text:
Your opponent cannot have the Imperial Favor.
Forced Reaction: After the conflict phase begins – each player draws 2 cards and loses 1 honor.

name: Golden Plains Raider
text: Action: After this character wins a conflict as an attacker, choose a faceup card in a province controlled by your opponent – discard that card.

name: Moto Outrider
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict in which this character is participating – ready this character.

name: Root Out Heresy
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict – discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Until the end of the conflict, reduce the strength of the attacked province by X, where X is the cost of the discarded card.

name: Kakita's Final Stance
text: Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a participating character  – until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be bowed by opponent's card effects. If it is involved in a duel during this conflict, it does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Mantra of Air
text: Reaction: After an opponent declares an [air] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – honor that character and draw 1 card.

name: In Service to My Lord
text:
This card can be played from your discard pile.
Action: Bow a (friendly) non-unique character and choose a unique character – ready the chosen character. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.

name: Cloak of Night
text:
Play only if you control a Shugenja character.
Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3 glory and cannot be chosen as the target of opponent's card abilities.

name: Castigated
text:
Play only during a [pol] conflict, only on a participating character, and only if you control an Imperial character.
If attached character's [pol] skill is 0, discard it. (Do not discard if its skill is a dash.)

name: Know the Terrain
text: Interrupt: When an attack is declared against a non-stronghold facedown province you control, before revealing that province – switch it with another facedown non-stronghold province you control.
